name: Leeks & Celery Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the leeks and celery in a little oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add 2/3 cup water. Season with salt and pepper, cover, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Transfer the vegetables to an ovenproof baking dish.
4. In another pan, melt the butter. Stir in the flour, mustard powder, and turmeric. Cook for 2 minutes.
5. Gradually add the milk, stirring constantly to make a smooth sauce.
6. Pour the sauce over the leeks and celery.
7. Mix the cheese and breadcrumbs together and sprinkle evenly over the top.
8. Brown in the oven at 375°F for 15 minutes.
